metadata.description: Send Reminders to Vendors from Purchase Order Follow Up App. If no recipient send to testpostfach

parameters.subscriptionRequest/filterexpression: sst_remind eq true and sst_remidertype eq 2 and sst_triggerstart eq true

parameters.$filter: sst_remind eq true and sst_reminderlevel eq 1 and sst_remidertype eq 2 and sst_remindercreated eq false
parameters.$orderby: sst_vendoraccountnumber_integer asc, sst_ordernumber asc, sst_linenumber asc

Compose_body_for_table_delivery_reminder.inputs:
<style>
table {
  border: 1px solid #1C6EA4;
  background-color: #EEEEEE;
  width: 100%;
  text-align: left;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}
table td, table th {
  border: 1px solid #AAAAAA;
  padding: 3px 2px;
}
table tbody td {
  font-size: 13px;
}
table thead {
  background: #1C6EA4;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #444444;
}
table thead th {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #FFFFFF;
  border-left: 2px solid #D0E4F5;
}
table thead th:first-child {
  border-left: none;
}
</style>@{body('Create_HTML_table_for_delivery_reminder')}

body.content:
@{items('Apply_to_each_templates_text_for_delivery_reminder')?['sst_ortemplatetext']}
@{outputs('Translate_table_delivery_reminder')?['body/responsev2/predictionOutput/text']}



 

Mit freundlichen Grüßen / Best regards

@{first(outputs('get_user_for_signature')?['body/value'])['fullname']}
@{first(outputs('get_user_for_signature')?['body/value'])['title']}
@{outputs('Translate_user_title')?['body/responsev2/predictionOutput/text']}

SCHULZ Systemtechnik GmbH
@{first(outputs('get_user_for_signature')?['body/value'])['address1_line1']}
@{first(outputs('get_user_for_signature')?['body/value'])['address1_postalcode']} @{first(outputs('get_user_for_signature')?['body/value'])['address1_city']}
Phone: @{first(outputs('get_user_for_signature')?['body/value'])['address1_telephone1']}
Fax: +49 4445 897-300
E-Mail: @{first(outputs('get_user_for_signature')?['body/value'])['internalemailaddress']}
Web: https://www.schulz.st

Handelsregister Oldenburg: HRB 110 136
Geschäftsführer: Heinrich Schulz, Tobias Schulz, Axel Hessenkämper

Trade Register Oldenburg: HRB 110 136
Members of the Board of Management: Heinrich Schulz, Tobias Schulz, Axel Hessenkämper

parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Für diese Bestellnummer, den Kreditor kann nicht per Email erreicht werden.

Such andere Kontaktmöglichkeiten !
